{{Quote|Missiles active commander!|Anti-Air Clone Trooper|<ref name="GB:CC">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>}}
The '''clone heavy assault troopers''', also known as '''clone heavy troopers''' and '''anti-air clone troopers''' were heavy weapons specialists in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Description==
[[File:GAR_aatroops.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Clone anti-air troopers on standby.]]
The clone heavy assault [[Clone trooper/Legends|troopers]] were the [[heavy weapon specialist]] specialized in using mobile emplacement weapons.<ref name="Shatterpoint">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref> Clone heavy troopers often carried [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]] [[PLX-1/Legends|PLX-1 portable missile launchers]], [[DC-15S/Legends|DC-15S]], [[V-1 thermal detonator]]s, [[HX2 antipersonnel mine]]s and other [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC]] trooper equipment. The heavy troopers handled the anti-vehicle, anti-airborne, and anti-armor duties of the Grand Army of the Republic. The units were not as resilient as [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|AT-TEs]] or [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/Legends|LAATs]] but offered ground units some protection against vehicles and air attacks.<ref name="BFII">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''</ref> A similar unit was the [[Heavy weapons clone trooper/Legends|clone heavy gunner]].<ref name="RotSg">[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' video game]]</ref>

Some [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commanders]], such as Commander [[Bacara/Legends|Bacara]], were equipped with [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] heavy trooper [[Armor/Legends|armor]] such as the cheek plating, and [[Kama/Legends|Kamas]].<ref name="BFII" />

==History==
Early during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], anti-air clone troopers fought alongside [[General/Legends|General]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] during the [[Hunt for the Decimator|Decimator campaign]].<ref name="GB:CC" />

[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Four-Nine]] commanded a heavy assault trooper [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] during the [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|Battle of Haruun Kal]].<ref name="Shatterpoint" />

Later, clone heavy trooper of the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] fought on [[Battle of Mygeeto|Mygeeto]], [[Battle of Felucia (Outer Rim Sieges)/Legends|Felucia]], [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Utapau]] and during [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|Operation: Knightfall]]. The clone heavy trooper eventually became the heavy weapon specialists of the [[Imperial shock trooper/Legends|Imperial shock troopers]].<ref name="BFII" />

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'', the clone soldiers called "heavy troopers" wore a white version of that of [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Bacara/Legends|Bacara]] of the [[Galactic Marines/Legends|Galactic Marines]].<ref name="BFII" />
